mapper.select: /* 팀 분류 조회 TeamDAO.selectLastTeamNm */ SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_LMS_TEAM TLT WHERE TEAM_TYCD = #{teamCtgrCd}

/* 팀 목록 조회 TeamDAO.listTeam */ SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY LENGTH(TEAMNM), TEAMNM) AS LINE_NO , TEAM_TYCD , TEAM_ID , TEAMNM , NVL((SELECT U.USERNM FROM TB_LMS_USR U, TB_LMS_ATNDLC_SBJCT S, TB_LMS_TEAM_MBR M WHERE U.USER_ID = S.USER_ID AND S.STD_ID = M.STD_ID AND M.TEAM_ID = A.TEAM_ID and M.TEAM_LDRYN = 'Y'),'-') AS LEADER_NM , (SELECT COUNT(TLTS.STD_ID) FROM TB_LMS_TEAM_MBR TLTS WHERE TLTS.TEAM_ID = A.TEAM_ID) AS TEAM_MBR_CNT FROM TB_LMS_TEAM A WHERE 1=1 AND TEAM_TYCD = #{teamCtgrCd} ORDER BY LINE_NO ASC

/* 팀원 리스트 TeamDAO.listStd */ SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY AAA.TEAM_LDRYN, AAA.USERNM DESC) AS LINE_NO , AAA.* FROM ( SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY TLTS.TEAM_LDRYN, TLTS.STD_ID DESC) AS LINE_NO , TLTS.* , TLT.TEAMNM , (SELECT DEPTNM FROM TB_LMS_USR WHERE USER_ID = (SELECT USER_ID FROM TB_LMS_ATNDLC_SBJCT WHERE STD_ID = TLTS.STD_ID)) AS DEPTNM , (SELECT USERNM FROM TB_LMS_USR WHERE USER_ID = (SELECT USER_ID FROM TB_LMS_ATNDLC_SBJCT WHERE STD_ID = TLTS.STD_ID)) AS USERNM , (SELECT USER_ID FROM TB_LMS_USER_ACNT WHERE USER_ID = (SELECT USER_ID FROM TB_LMS_ATNDLC_SBJCT WHERE STD_ID = TLTS.STD_ID)) AS USER_ID FROM TB_LMS_TEAM_MBR TLTS, TB_LMS_TEAM TLT WHERE TLTS.TEAM_ID = TLT.TEAM_ID AND TLT.TEAM_ID = #{teamCd} ) AAA ORDER BY LINE_NO DESC, AAA.STD_ID ASC

/* 현재 팀원 리스트 TeamDAO.teamStdList */ SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY X.USERNM ASC) AS LINE_NO , X.* FROM ( SELECT (SELECT D.DEPTNM FROM TB_HOME_USER_DEPT_CD D, TB_LMS_USR U WHERE U.USER_ID = A.USER_ID AND D.DEPT_CD = U.DEPT_CD) AS DEPTNM , A.USER_ID , (SELECT USERNM FROM TB_LMS_USR WHERE USER_ID = A.USER_ID) AS USERNM , A.TEAM_LDRYN , A.STD_ID , NVL((SELECT SCYR FROM TB_LMS_ATNDLC_SBJCT WHERE STD_ID = A.STD_ID), '-') AS SCYR , NVL(TO_CHAR((SELECT AVG_CRDTS FROM TB_LMS_MRK WHERE USER_ID = A.USER_ID)), '-') AS AVG_CRDTS , NVL(( SELECT RISK_GRDCD FROM TB_LMS_LRN_STOP_RISK_IDX WHERE USER_ID = A.USER_ID AND PSTG_YR = D.SBJCT_ID AND PSTG_SMSTR = D.CRS_ID ), '-') AS RISK_GRDCD , (SELECT GDSC_DGRS_CRS_GBNCD FROM TB_LMS_ATNDLC_SBJCT WHERE STD_ID = A.STD_ID) GDSC_DGRS_CRS_GBNCD , (SELECT (SELECT CDNM FROM TB_ORG_CODE WHERE ORG_ID = X.ORG_ID AND CTGRCD = 'GDSC_DGRS_CRS_GBNCD' AND CD = X.GDSC_DGRS_CRS_GBNCD) FROM TB_LMS_ATNDLC_SBJCT X WHERE STD_ID = A.STD_ID) GRSC_DEGR_CORS_GBN_NM FROM TB_LMS_TEAM_MBR A JOIN TB_LMS_TEAM B ON A.TEAM_ID = B.TEAM_ID JOIN TB_LMS_TEAM_CTGR C ON B.TEAM_TYCD = C.TEAM_TYCD JOIN TB_LMS_SBJCT D ON C.SBJCT_ID = D.SBJCT_ID WHERE A.TEAM_ID = #{teamCd} ) X ORDER BY X.USERNM

/* 팀 리스트 조회 TeamDAO.selectTeamList */ SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY TEAM_ID) AS LINE_NO , TEAM_ID , TEAM_TYCD , TEAMNM , (SELECT U.USERNM FROM TB_LMS_USR U, TB_LMS_ATNDLC_SBJCT S, TB_LMS_TEAM_MBR M WHERE U.USER_ID = S.USER_ID AND S.STD_ID = M.STD_ID AND M.TEAM_ID = A.TEAM_ID and M.TEAM_LDRYN = 'Y') AS LEADER_NM , (SELECT COUNT(TLTS.STD_ID) FROM TB_LMS_TEAM_MBR TLTS WHERE TLTS.TEAM_ID = A.TEAM_ID) AS TEAM_MBR_CNT FROM TB_LMS_TEAM A WHERE 1=1 AND TEAM_TYCD = #{teamCtgrCd}

/* 토론 성적 분포 현황 TeamDAO.selectScoreChart_old */ SELECT MIN(SCR) AS minScore , MAX(SCR) AS maxScore , ROUND(AVG(SCR)) AS avgScore FROM TB_LMS_DSCS_PTCP TLTSS, TB_LMS_TEAM TLT WHERE TLTSS.TEAM_ID = TLT.TEAM_TYCD AND TLT.TEAM_TYCD = #{teamCtgrCd} GROUP BY TLT.TEAM_TYCD
/* 토론 성적 분포 현황 TeamDAO.selectScoreChart */ SELECT MIN(SCR) AS minScore , MAX(SCR) AS maxScore , ROUND(AVG(SCR)) AS avgScore FROM TB_LMS_DSCS_PTCP WHERE DSCS_ID = #{forumCd} GROUP BY DSCS_ID
/* 팀 분류 코드에 해당하는 팀 분류 조회 TeamDAO.selectTeamCtgrCd */ SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_lms_team_ctgr WHERE TEAM_TYCD = #{teamCtgrCd}
